AR1.justification: Content reads as descriptive pattern + diagnostic questions (would map to observations.md), but no in-band rationale distinguishing observation from decision and no canonical filename.

AR3.justification: No cross-references in the artifact; a methodology-shaped routing would expect a daybook Log breadcrumb pointing to the observation, which is missing.

AR4.justification: Single-file write with no ISO-dated section header — re-running would overwrite rather than append a new dated entry as the methodology requires for observations.md.
